managedFindings.title: scripts/foundation-verify.mjs has a managed file-size watch disposition
managedFindings.detail: scripts/foundation-verify.mjs has 4999 lines; Blocks at or above 5000 lines, or whenever a card adds verifier-domain behavior directly instead of delegating to a module.
managedFindings.nextAction: Keep extracting verifier domains into lib/foundation-verifier-* modules; add only import/wiring to scripts/foundation-verify.mjs.
managedFindings.threshold: Blocks at or above 5000 lines, or whenever a card adds verifier-domain behavior directly instead of delegating to a module.
managedFindings.nextTrigger: Split another verifier domain before the root reaches 5000 lines, before the review date expires, or before adding new check logic directly to the root script.

managedFindings.title: server.js has a managed file-size watch disposition
managedFindings.detail: server.js has 2073 lines; Blocks once the file reaches 3000 lines or accepts new route/domain behavior outside a route module.
managedFindings.nextAction: Keep server.js as thin route mounting/runtime wiring; implement route behavior in lib/*-routes.js modules.
managedFindings.threshold: Blocks once the file reaches 3000 lines or accepts new route/domain behavior outside a route module.
managedFindings.nextTrigger: Extract route/domain behavior before crossing 3000 lines or before adding a new app surface directly to server.js.

managedFindings.title: public/foundation.js has a managed file-size watch disposition
managedFindings.detail: public/foundation.js has 2991 lines; Blocks once the file reaches 3000 lines or accepts new renderer/domain behavior without extracting a renderer module.
managedFindings.nextAction: Keep public/foundation.js as shell wiring; move new UI behavior into public/foundation-*-renderers.js modules.
managedFindings.threshold: Blocks once the file reaches 3000 lines or accepts new renderer/domain behavior without extracting a renderer module.
managedFindings.nextTrigger: Extract another renderer slice before crossing 3000 lines or before adding feature-specific rendering behavior.

classification.reason: Admin deal backlog review writes governed Ops review/action/finding rows across Owners/FUB/ClickUp posture; a failed stale active-run row must stay parked until Steve approves the operational-write rerun or a safe read-only preflight narrows it.
classification.threshold: Blocks sprint if rerun outside the Admin Deal policy/source contract, if required for the active card, or if it remains failed after an approved safe rerun.
classification.nextAction: Park the failed operational-write row; use ADMIN-DEAL-POLICY-SOURCE-CONTRACT-001 as the source contract before any approved rerun.

classification.reason: Conditional Deal Forecast Sync reads governed Owners/Google Workspace business-source data and currently fails at delegated Google auth. The row is a business-source repair signal, not a reason to rerun broad connector or sheet work without approval.
classification.threshold: Blocks green while the job remains failed and unrerouted; blocks any Sales/Ops/business-source card that depends on conditional deal forecast freshness until an approved read-only preflight or credential repair succeeds.
classification.nextAction: Park the failed read-only business-source row; use ADMIN-DEAL-POLICY-SOURCE-CONTRACT-001 and connector health proof before any approved rerun or credential repair.

classification.reason: The remaining recent job failures are routed verifier, business-source, backfill, or operational-write rows; connector uptime has a later successful safe run and repeated build-lane reds are clear.
classification.threshold: Becomes sprint-blocking when an unclassified repeated job failure appears, or when an approved safe rerun fails again without a live repair card.
